evals.description: Trigger test: skill activates for economy design question
evals.prompt: I need to design the gold economy for my RPG. Players earn gold from quests and monster drops but I'm worried about inflation. How should I structure sinks and faucets?

evals.description: Trigger test: skill activates for difficulty curve question
evals.prompt: My playtesters say level 15 is way too hard and most people quit there. How do I fix the difficulty curve?

evals.description: Trigger test: skill activates for XP progression question
evals.prompt: What's a good XP curve formula for a 100-level MMO?

evals.description: Core task: can design an economy audit table with sinks and faucets
evals.prompt: Create an economy audit for my mobile game. Players earn coins from battles (100/battle), daily login (500), and selling items (50/item). They spend on upgrades (200-2000), potions (50), and gacha pulls (300).

evals.description: Core task: can calculate XP curve with correct formula
evals.prompt: Calculate an XP curve for a 30-level game using base_xp=100 and exponent=2.0. Show me levels 1, 5, 10, 20, and 30.

evals.description: Core task: can design loot table with rarity tiers and pity system
evals.prompt: Design a loot table for a dungeon boss with 5 rarity tiers. Include drop rates and a pity system.

evals.description: Core task: can recommend difficulty curve shape for a given game type
evals.prompt: I'm making a casual puzzle game for mobile. What difficulty curve shape should I use and why?

evals.description: Core task: can interpret playtest completion rate data
evals.prompt: My playtest data shows: Level 1: 98% completion, Level 5: 85%, Level 8: 42%, Level 9: 78%, Level 10 boss: 31%. What does this tell me about my balance?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about nerfing popular strategies instead of buffing alternatives
evals.prompt: All my players are using the fire mage build because it does 3x more damage than other classes. Should I nerf fire mage damage by 60%?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about changing multiple systems at once
evals.prompt: My game feels unbalanced. I want to halve all gold drops, double enemy HP, reduce player damage by 30%, and add a new currency all in the next patch. Good plan?

evals.description: Gotcha: identifies need for pity system on random drops
evals.prompt: My legendary items have a 0.5% drop rate. Some players have done 300 runs without getting one. Is this expected?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not invent game engines or balancing software that doesn't exist
evals.prompt: What's the best auto-balancing API I can call to automatically tune my game's difficulty?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not cite specific industry statistics without caveats
evals.prompt: What's the exact optimal completion rate for game levels according to GDC research?

evals.description: References load: correctly points to economy-design reference for deep economy questions
evals.prompt: I need to build a full multiplayer auction house economy with anti-manipulation protections. Where should I start?
